sizing_rule.note: Split account into inactive (75%) and active (25%) portions. Apply optimal f calculation only to the active portion. Position size = optimal f × active equity. Initial allocation for new traders: 75% inactive reserve, 25% active trading capital.

source_rule_text: Split account into inactive and active portions, sizing positions based on optimal f applied only to the active portion, with initial allocation of 75% inactive and 25% active for traders new to the strategy
